ticket.title: Verify CHANGELOG entry exists for v0.4.0
ticket.description: The branch may already contain the CHANGELOG entry. Confirm the entry exists; if so, no edits are needed.

specBundle.content:
# Verify CHANGELOG v0.4.0

Check that `CHANGELOG.md` lists v0.4.0. If it already does, leave the branch as-is and document the verification in `summary`.

- [ ] Read CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] If v0.4.0 already present, return filesWritten=[] with summary explaining why

operatorComments: The previous PR may have already added this — please verify before re-editing.
recordedFinalText: {"filesWritten":[],"commitMessage":"chore: verify CHANGELOG v0.4.0 entry already present","summary":"CHANGELOG.md already lists v0.4.0 with the expected release notes; no edits required. Verified by reading the file on the change branch.","followUps":["None — entry already covers this release."]}
